sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 84:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 84:1
items.html: Eight of direct light, from Hochma to Yesod. They clothe the more refined vessels, meaning the light of Hochma in the vessel of Keter, etc., and two of reflected light, Yesod and Malchut, which clothe the vessels Yesod and Malchut.
